overall.description: A first-person walk through the bustling streets of Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves from a sunlit plaza through shaded overpasses and neon-lit commercial districts, passing giant holographic advertisements and futuristic architecture. The scene showcases the game's ray-traced lighting and dense urban environment with moderate pedestrian and vehicle activity.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a vibrant commercial district featuring massive holographic billboards including the prominent 'IT'S BIG' advertisement. The camera passes a distinctive noodle shop topped with a giant steaming bowl structure, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in neon signage.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a wide city avenue featuring tram tracks running down the center. The perspective opens up to show distant towering skyscrapers with bright pink and blue neon signage, while following a pedestrian ahead.

segments.scene_description: Approaching a busy city intersection with moderate vehicle traffic. The camera waits near the crosswalk before proceeding across, passing various cars and pedestrians. Modern glass buildings line the street as the walk continues through the bustling downtown area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunlit plaza into the shaded depths of a neon-drenched commercial district. It begins by moving past a teal kiosk and a prominent yellow MIXIT building, heading toward an overhead pedestrian bridge lined with palm trees. As the camera passes beneath the city's overhead walkways, the lighting shifts into deep shade while crossing a zebra-striped crosswalk past a purple vending machine. The scene then opens into a vibrant urban corridor where massive holographic billboards, including a prominent IT'S BIG advertisement, dominate the skyline. Finally, the camera glides past a noodle shop topped with a giant steaming bowl structure, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in glowing neon signage.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wide urban avenue that transitions from an open vista of skyscrapers into the dense activity of a downtown intersection. It begins by gliding along tram tracks in the center of the street, following a pedestrian toward a horizon dominated by towering buildings and vibrant pink and blue neon signage. As the camera advances, the open perspective narrows toward a busy city crossing filled with moderate vehicle traffic. The scene then shifts as the camera pauses at the crosswalk before proceeding through the crowd, passing sleek cars and modern glass buildings that line the bustling street.
